channel.title: Posts on André Tipping
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on André Tipping

item.title: Creating a static website using Hugo and hosting it on Github
item.description: I’m going to lay it out here, the steps I took to create this website and then host it on github, as the official guide isn’t hugely clear. I am going to split this post into two sections: creation of the site, and then deploying it to github. Creating the site The first step is to install Hugo. I’m running Linux-Mint so I used the following in the command line:
